blocks.text: Two miracles needed tonight: Liverpool and Barcelona face the impossible

Anfield has conjured miracles before — but PSG arrive road-tested and 2-0 up. In Madrid, Barcelona need away goals at the Metropolitano where Atlético suffocate everything. One of these nights ends in heartbreak.
🎮 IEM Rio 2026 — rain, hallzerk & sense hunting glory in Brazil (live)

items: Wed 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid at the Allianz (Bayern lead 2-1)
